prerequisites.noFund: Create a fund first to access reconciliation.
prerequisites.noBankAccount: Create a bank account first to access this feature.

excel.title: Accounting from an Excel file
excel.description: Upload an Excel file to import patients, funds, and procedures into the database.

fundReconciliation.title: Fund Reconciliation from a PDF
fundReconciliation.description: Upload a PDF payment statement to reconcile with procedures in the database.

bankReconciliation.title: Bank Reconciliation from a bank statement PDF
bankReconciliation.description: Upload a bank statement PDF to reconcile transfers with fund payment groups.
